1350        if self.frequencies.index(m) > self.frequencies.index(frequency) & self.frequencies.index(m) < len(self.frequencies)-1:
1351            freq_ratio_temp, start_temp = agg_helper(frequency, m, hist[i])
1352            hist_agg = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].groupby(hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).filter(lambda x: len(x) == freq_ratio_temp)
1353            hist_agg = hist_agg.groupby(hist_agg.reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).mean()
1354            hist_agg.index = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].index[::freq_ratio_temp][:hist_agg.shape[0]]
1355            hist_agg.index = hist_agg.index.map(lambda x: x.replace(day=1))
1356            
1357            idx = hist_agg.index.intersection(self.YY_mean_agg.index, sort=False)
1358            self.YY_mean_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1359            self.YY_median_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1360            self.YY_095_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1361            self.YY_005_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1362            self.YY_084_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1363            self.YY_016_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1364        
1365        i = i+1
1366    
1367    if reset_index == True:
1368        index_new = pd.PeriodIndex(self.YY_mean_agg.index, freq= frequency)
1369        self.YY_mean_agg.index = index_new
1370        self.YY_median_agg.index = index_new
1371        self.YY_095_agg.index = index_new
1372        self.YY_005_agg.index = index_new
1373        self.YY_084_agg.index = index_new
1374        self.YY_016_agg.index = index_new
1375    
1376    self.agg_freq = frequency

Aggregates the Mean, Median and quantililes in the highest frequency to the desired frequency.

The Function ensures, that we start at the beginning of a Year or Quarter depending on the chosen frequency

Parameters

frequency : str The frequency to which the data should be aggregated to reset_index : boolean Schould index be changed to period Index

def fanchart( self, variables='all', save=True, name='Fancharts', show=True, agg=False, nhist=10): 
110def fanchart(self, variables = "all", save = True, name = "Fancharts", show = True, agg = False, nhist = 10):
111    
112    '''
113    Creates fan plots of the desired variables.
114    
115    
116    Parameters
117    ----------
118    variable : list of strings
119        variables for which the plot should be generated, all if it should be generated for all
120    save : boolean
121        Whether the plots should be saved. The default is True.
122    name : string, optional
123        If the plots should be saved, path/name not including filetype. The default is None.
124    show : boolean
125        Whether the plots should be shown. Default is True.
126    agg : boolean
127        Whether the aggregated values should be shown
128    nhist : int
129        number of historical periods that should be shown on the plot
130        Default is 5
131
132    '''
133    
134    plt.ioff()
135    
136    if self.forecast_draws_list is None :
137            sys.exit("Error: To generate traceplots, generate forecasts first")
138    
139    if isinstance(variables, str):
140        if variables == "all":
141            variables = self.varlist_list[-1]
142        else:
143            sys.exit("variables must be either a list of variables or all")
144    
145    if agg == True and not hasattr(self, 'YY_095_agg'):
146        sys.exit("Aggregate first")
147        
148        
149    check = set(variables)-set(self.varlist_list[-1])        
150    if check and not variables == "all":
151        sys.exit(print(check, " not in " , self.varlist_list[-1]))
152    
153    if agg == True:
154        
155        # Set the frequency ratio        
156        freq_lf = self.agg_freq
157        freq_hf = self.frequencies[-1]
158        if freq_hf == "Q" and freq_lf == "Y":
159            freq_ratio = 4
160        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Y":
161            freq_ratio = 12
162        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Y":
163            freq_ratio = 48
164        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "Y":
165            freq_ratio = 260
166        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Q":
167            freq_ratio = 3
168        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Q":
169            freq_ratio = 12
170        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "M":
171            freq_ratio = 4
172        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "W":
173            freq_ratio = 5
174        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "M":
175            freq_ratio = 20
176        
177        forecast_start = self.YY_mean_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio),:].name
178        
179            
180        if save == True:
181            pdf = matplotlib.backends.backend_pdf.PdfPages(name + ".pdf")
182            
183        for variable in variables:
184            
185            idx, = np.where(self.varlist_list[-1] == variable)
186            
187            fig, ax = plt.subplots()
188            x = self.YY_095_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx].index.to_timestamp()
189            ax.fill_between(x, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_095_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx])), np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_005_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx])), alpha = 0.5, color = "blue")
190            ax.fill_between(x, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_084_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx])), np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_016_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx])), alpha = 0.7, color = "blue")          
191            ax.plot(x, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_mean_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx])), color = "red", linewidth = 0.5)
192            
193            ax.set_xticks(x)
194            ax.set_xticklabels(self.YY_095_agg.iloc[-int(self.H/freq_ratio+nhist):,idx].index)
195            plt.setp(ax.get_xticklabels(), rotation=40, horizontalalignment='right')
196
197            #plt.axvline(x= forecast_start,  color='black', ls='--', lw=0.5)
198            title = "Mean and 90% and 68% CI of: " + variable
199            plt.title(title)
200            plt.xlabel('Date')
201            plt.ylabel('Value')
202            if save == True:
203                pdf.savefig( fig )
204            if show == True:
205                plt.show()
206        if save == True:
207            pdf.close() 
208
209    else:
210        forecast_start = self.YY_mean_pd.iloc[-self.H,:].name
211        if save == True:
212            pdf = matplotlib.backends.backend_pdf.PdfPages(name + ".pdf")
213            
214        for variable in variables:
215            
216            idx, = np.where(self.varlist_list[-1] == variable)
217            
218            self.YY_095_pd
219            fig, ax = plt.subplots()
220            ax.fill_between(self.YY_095_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx].index, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_095_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx])), np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_005_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx])), alpha = 0.5, color = "blue")
221            ax.fill_between(self.YY_095_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx].index, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_084_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx])), np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_016_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx])), alpha = 0.7, color = "blue")          
222            ax.plot(self.YY_mean_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx].index, np.squeeze(np.array(self.YY_mean_pd.iloc[-(self.H+nhist):,idx])), color = "red", linewidth = 0.5)
223            plt.axvline(x=forecast_start,  color='black', ls='--', lw=0.5)
224            title = "Mean and 90% and 68% CI of: " + variable
225            plt.title(title)
226            plt.xlabel('Date')
227            plt.ylabel('Value')
228            if save == True:
229                pdf.savefig( fig )
230            if show == True:
231                plt.show()
232        if save == True:
233            pdf.close()
234    plt.close("all")

Creates fan plots of the desired variables.

Parameters

variable : list of strings variables for which the plot should be generated, all if it should be generated for all save : boolean Whether the plots should be saved. The default is True. name : string, optional If the plots should be saved, path/name not including filetype. The default is None. show : boolean Whether the plots should be shown. Default is True. agg : boolean Whether the aggregated values should be shown nhist : int number of historical periods that should be shown on the plot Default is 5

def mean_plot(self, variables='all', save=True, name='Output', show=True): 
 50def mean_plot(self, variables = "all", save = True, name = "Output", show = True):
 51    
 52    '''
 53    Creates cumulative mean plots of the forecasts. If the model has converged the cumulative mean should be stable after burnin.
 54    
 55    Parameters
 56    ----------
 57    variable : list of strings
 58        variables for which the plot should be generated, all if it should be generated for all
 59    save : boolean
 60        Whether the plots should be saved. The default is True.
 61    name : string, optional
 62        If the plots should be saved, path/name not including filetype. The default is None.
 63    show : boolean
 64        Whether the plots should be shown. Default is True.
 65        
 66    '''
 67    plt.ioff()
 68    
 69    
 70    if self.forecast_draws_list is None :
 71            sys.exit("Error: To generate traceplots, generate forecasts first")
 72    
 73    if isinstance(variables, str):
 74        if variables == "all":
 75            variables = self.varlist_list[-1]
 76        else:
 77            sys.exit("variables must be either a list of variables or all")
 78        
 79        
 80    check = set(variables)-set(self.varlist_list[-1])        
 81    if check and not variables == "all":
 82        sys.exit(print(check, " not in " , self.varlist_list[-1]))
 83    
 84    if save == True:
 85        pdf = matplotlib.backends.backend_pdf.PdfPages(name + ".pdf")
 86        
 87    for variable in variables:
 88        
 89        idx, = np.where(self.varlist_list[-1] == variables)
 90        lst = list(self.forecast_draws_list[-1].T)
 91
 92        fig = plt.figure()           
 93        df = pd.DataFrame(lst[idx[0]].T).expanding().mean()
 94        plt.plot(df, linewidth=0.5)
 95        plt.axvline(x=self.nburn,  color='black', ls='--', lw=0.5)
 96        title = "Mean Plot of: " + variable
 97        plt.title(title)
 98        plt.xlabel('Draws')
 99        plt.ylabel('Value')
100        if save == True:
101            pdf.savefig( fig )
102        if show == True:
103            plt.show()
104    if save == True:
105        pdf.close() 
106    plt.close("all")

Creates cumulative mean plots of the forecasts. If the model has converged the cumulative mean should be stable after burnin.

Parameters

variable : list of strings variables for which the plot should be generated, all if it should be generated for all save : boolean Whether the plots should be saved. The default is True. name : string, optional If the plots should be saved, path/name not including filetype. The default is None. show : boolean Whether the plots should be shown. Default is True.

def to_excel(self, filename, agg=False): 
 66def to_excel(self, filename, agg = False):
 67    
 68    '''
 69    Writes the results to an excel
 70    
 71    Parameters
 72    ----------
 73    agg : Boolean
 74        Should the aggregated series be saved
 75    filname : Sting
 76        file path.
 77
 78    '''
 79    
 80    if self.forecast_draws_list is None :
 81            sys.exit("Error: To generate traceplots, generate forecasts first")
 82            
 83    if agg == True and not hasattr(self, 'YY_095_agg'):
 84        sys.exit("Aggregate first")
 85    
 86    if agg == False:
 87        
 88        with pd.ExcelWriter(filename, engine = "xlsxwriter", datetime_format='yyyy-mm-dd') as writer:
 89        #writer = pd.ExcelWriter("sim_data.xlsx", engine="xlsxwriter")
 90            self.YY_mean_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "mean")
 91            self.YY_median_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "median")
 92            self.YY_095_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "95_quantile")
 93            self.YY_005_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "5_quantile")
 94            self.YY_084_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "84_quantile")
 95            self.YY_016_pd.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "16_quantile")
 96        #writer.close()
 97    else:
 98        if type(self.YY_mean_agg.index) == pd.DatetimeIndex:
 99            with pd.ExcelWriter(filename, engine = "xlsxwriter", datetime_format='yyyy-mm-dd') as writer:
100            #writer = pd.ExcelWriter("sim_data.xlsx", engine="xlsxwriter")
101                self.YY_mean_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "mean")
102                self.YY_median_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "median")
103                self.YY_095_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "95_quantile")
104                self.YY_005_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "5_quantile")
105                self.YY_084_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "84_quantile")
106                self.YY_016_agg.to_excel(writer, sheet_name = "16_quantile")
107        else:
108            if self.agg_freq == "Q":
109                with pd.ExcelWriter(filename, engine = "xlsxwriter") as writer:
110                    self.YY_mean_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_mean_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "mean")
111                    self.YY_median_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_median_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "median")
112                    self.YY_095_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_095_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "95_quantile")
113                    self.YY_005_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_005_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "5_quantile")
114                    self.YY_084_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_084_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "84_quantile")
115                    self.YY_016_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_016_agg.index.strftime('%YQ%q')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "16_quantile")
116            if self.agg_freq == "Y":
117                with pd.ExcelWriter(filename, engine = "xlsxwriter") as writer:
118                    self.YY_mean_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_mean_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "mean")
119                    self.YY_median_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_median_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "median")
120                    self.YY_095_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_095_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "95_quantile")
121                    self.YY_005_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_005_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "5_quantile")
122                    self.YY_084_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_084_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "84_quantile")
123                    self.YY_016_agg.assign(Index= self.YY_016_agg.index.strftime('%Y')).set_index('Index').to_excel(writer,  sheet_name = "16_quantile")

Writes the results to an excel

Parameters

agg : Boolean Should the aggregated series be saved filname : Sting file path.

def save(self, filename='mufbvar_model.pkl'): 
50def save(self, filename = "mufbvar_model.pkl"):
51        
52        '''
53        Saves the MFBVAR Object
54        
55        Parameters
56        ----------
57        filename : str
58            Path where to save the object. End must be .pkl
59        
60        '''
61        with open(filename, 'wb') as outp:  # Overwrites any existing file.
62            pickle.dump(self, outp, pickle.HIGHEST_PROTOCOL)

Saves the MFBVAR Object

Parameters

filename : str Path where to save the object. End must be .pkl

def update_hyperparameters( self, mufbvar_data, pbounds, init_points, n_iter, nsim, save=False, name='hyp.txt'): 
 40def update_hyperparameters(self, mufbvar_data, pbounds, init_points, n_iter, nsim, save = False, name = "hyp.txt"):
 41    
 42    '''
 43    This method uses bayesian optimization to find the hyperparameters with the highest mdd\n
 44    lambda 1: overall tightness\n
 45    lambda 2:  scaling down the variance for the coefficients of a distant lag\n
 46    lambda 3:  number of observations used for obtaining the prior for the covariance matrix of error terms, fixed to 1\n
 47    lambda 4: . tuning parameter for coefficients for constant\n
 48    lambda 5:  tuning parameter for the covariance between coefficients\n
 49
 50    
 51    Parameters
 52    ----------
 53    mufbvar_data : mufbvar_data class object 
 54        data in the form of a mufbvar_data class object
 55    pbound : dict
 56        boundries for each hyperparameter\n
 57        two frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1
 58        three frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2
 59        four frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2, lambda1_3, lambda2_3, lambda4_3, lambda5_3
 60    init_points : int
 61        How many steps of random exploration you want to perform
 62    n_iter : int
 63        How many steps of bayesian optimization you want to perform
 64    nsim : int
 65        number of draws in each MUFBVAR estimation
 66    save : boolean
 67        True if you want to save the hyperparameters as a txt
 68    name : str
 69        path where you want to save the hyperparameters
 70        
 71    Returns
 72    ----------
 73    
 74    hyp : list
 75        list containing the optimized hyperparameters
 76        
 77
 78    '''
 79    
 80    def estim(hyp_list, nsim):
 81        
 82        self.nex = 1
 83        mdd_list = [np.nan] * (len(mufbvar_data.frequencies)-1)
 84
 85        # data from mufbvar_data
 86
 87        YMX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMX_list)
 88        YM0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM0_list)
 89        select_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_m_list)
 90        vars_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.vars_m_list)
 91        YMh_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMh_list)
 92        index_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.index_list)
 93        frequencies = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.frequencies)
 94        self.frequencies = frequencies
 95        YQX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQX_list)
 96        YQ0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ0_list)
 97        select_q = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_q)
 98        input_data_Q =  copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data_Q)
 99        self.input_data_Q = input_data_Q
100        varlist_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.varlist_list)
101        select_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list)
102        select_c_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_c_list)
103        Nm_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nm_list)
104        nv_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.nv_list)
105        Nq_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nq_list)
106        select_list_sep = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list_sep)
107        freq_ratio_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.freq_ratio_list)
108        YQ_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ_list)
109        Tstar_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Tstar_list)
110        T_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.T_list)
111        YDATA_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YDATA_list)
112        YM_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM_list)
113        input_data = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data)
114        self.input_data = input_data
115
116        nburn = round((self.nburn_perc)*nsim)
117        self.nburn = nburn
118
119        #test if nlags for each step is at least frequency ratio
120        for i in range(len(freq_ratio_list)):
121            if deque(self.nlags)[i] < freq_ratio_list[i]:
122                sys.exit("The number of lags at each step must be at least as long as the corresponding frequency ratio")
123
124        # fit the model
125        ###############
126
127        nlags_list_ = self.nlags
128
129        # Initialize Matrices
130        #########################
131
132        # here we initialize all the matrixes for the sampling for all frequencies
133        # we again create lists and append them, in the sample loop we can then
134        # access these matrices 
135
136        #create empty lists, so we can append to them
137        T0_list = deque()
138        p_list = deque()
139        nlags_list = deque()
140        kq_list = deque()
141        nobs_list = deque()
142        Tnew_list = deque()
143        Tnobs_list = deque()
144
145        varstxt_list = deque()
146        smpltxt_list = deque()
147
148        index_NY_list = deque()
149
150        Sigmap_list    = deque()
151        Phip_list      = deque()
152        Cons_list      = deque()
153        lstate_list    = deque()
154        YYactsim_list  = deque()
155        XXactsim_list  = deque()
156
157        At_mat_list    = deque()
158        Pt_mat_list    = deque()
159        Atildemat_list = deque()
160        Ptildemat_list = deque()
161        loglh_list   = deque()
162        counter_list = deque()
163
164        phi_mm_list = deque()
165
166        phi_mq_list = deque()
167        phi_mc_list = deque()
168        phi_qc_list = deque()
169
170        Phi_list = deque()
171
172        # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
173        GAMMAs_list = deque()
174
175
176        GAMMAz_list = deque()
177        GAMMAc_list = deque()
178        GAMMAu_list = deque()
179
180        LAMBDAs_list = deque()
181
182        LAMBDAz_list = deque()
183        LAMBDAc_list = deque()
184        LAMBDAu_list = deque()
185
186        # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
187        sigma_list = deque()
188        sig_mm_list = deque()
189        sig_mq_list = deque()
190        sig_qm_list = deque()
191        sig_qq_list = deque()
192
193        # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
194        Wmatrix_list = deque()
195        LAMBDAs_t_list = deque()
196        LAMBDAz_t_list = deque()
197        LAMBDAc_t_list = deque()
198        LAMBDAu_t_list = deque()
199
200        At_list = deque()
201        At_draw_list = deque()
202        Pt_list = deque()
203        Pmean_list = deque()
204
205        Zm_list = deque()
206
207        Yq_list = deque()
208        Ym_list = deque()
209
210        Pt_last_list = deque()
211
212        YY_list = deque()
213
214        #for i in range(len(YMh_list)):
215        T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
216        p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
217        nlags_list.append(p_list[0])
218        kq_list.append(Nq_list[0] * p_list[0])
219        nobs_list.append(int(T_list[0]) - int(T0_list[0]))
220        Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T_list[0])
221        Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T0_list[0])
222
223
224
225        #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
226        YMh_list[0] = YMh_list[0][int(T0_list[0]):-int(freq_ratio_list[0]),:]
227        varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[0].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
228        smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[0].index[int(T0_list[0]):])
229
230        index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[0][nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0]:Tnobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
231
232        # Parameter estimation
233        # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
234        Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0],nv_list[0])))
235        Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0]))))
236        Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0])))
237        lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[0],int(Tnobs_list[0]))))
238        YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[0]+1,nv_list[0])))
239        XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1)))
240
241        At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
242        Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), (Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))**2)))
243        Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
244        Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1),Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
245        loglh_list.append(0)
246        counter_list.append(0)
247
248        # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
249        phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[0])*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
250        phi_mm_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]] = np.eye(Nm_list[0])
251
252        phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
253        phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[0])))
254        phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[0])))
255
256        Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])*(int(p_list[0])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])))))
257
258        # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
259        GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1), Nq_list[0] * (int(p_list[0])+1))))
260        IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[0])
261
262        for j in range(int(p_list[0])):
263            GAMMAs_list[0][(j+1)*Nq_list[0]:(j+2)*Nq_list[0], j*Nq_list[0]:(j+1)*Nq_list[0]] = IQ
264            
265        GAMMAs_list[0][:Nq_list[0],:Nq_list[0]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[0])
266
267        GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]* (int(p_list[0])+1), int(Nm_list[0])*p_list[0])))
268        GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), 1)))
269        GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[0]), np.zeros((p_list[0]*Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
270
271        LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[0]))),1/freq_ratio_list[0]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[0]), freq_ratio_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]-(freq_ratio_list[0]-1)))))))))
272
273        LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0], p_list[0]*Nm_list[0])))))
274        LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],1)))))
275        LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nm_list[0])))))
276
277        # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
278        sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[0]+Nq_list[0]))
279        sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]])
280        sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0], Nm_list[0]:])
281        sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:, :Nm_list[0]])
282        sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:,Nm_list[0]:])
283
284        # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
285
286        Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
287        LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAs_list[0])
288        LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAz_list[0])
289        LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAc_list[0])
290        LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAu_list[0])
291
292        At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
293        Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
294
295        for kk in range(5):
296            Pt_list[0] = GAMMAs_list[0] @ Pt_list[0] @ GAMMAs_list[0].T + GAMMAu_list[0] @ sig_qq_list[0] @ GAMMAu_list[0].T
297
298        # Lagged HF observations
299        Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[0], Nm_list[0]*p_list[0])))
300
301        if Zm_list[0].size:
302            for j in range(p_list[0]):
303                Zm_list[0][:, j * Nm_list[0]:(j+1)*Nm_list[0]] = YM_list[0][T0_list[0]-(j+1):T0_list[0]+nobs_list[0]-(j+1),:]
304                
305        # Observations in Monthly Freq
306
307        Ym_list.append(YM_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
308            
309        Yq_list.append(YQ_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
310
311
312        # Estimation
313        #################
314        print(" ", end = '\n')
315        print("Multi Frequency BVAR: Estimation", end = '\n')
316        print("Frequencies: ", self.frequencies, end = "\n")
317        print("Total Number of Draws: ",nsim)
318
319        #Here we start the sample loop, j is the current sample
320        #inside the sample loop we need a loop for the MFBVARS: m
321        for j in tqdm(range(nsim)):
322            for m in range(len(YMh_list)):
323                
324                # initialization
325                if j > 0:
326                    At_list[m] = At_draw_list[m][0,:].T 
327                    Pt_list[m] = Pmean_list[m]
328                    
329                # Kalman Filter Loop
330                #########################
331                
332                
333                for t in range(nobs_list[m]):  
334                    
335                    if Ym_list[m].size:
336                        
337                        if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
338                            At1 = At_list[m]
339                            Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
340                            # Forecasting
341                            alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
342                            Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
343                            Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
344                            yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
345                            nut = np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][t,:], Yq_list[m][t,:])) - yhat  
346                            Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
347                                + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
348                                + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
349                            Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
350                            Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
351                            sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
352                            At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
353                            Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
354                            At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
355                            Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
356                        else:
357                            At1 = At_list[m]
358                            Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
359                            # Forecasting
360                            alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
361                            Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
362                            Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
363                            yhat = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_t_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_t_list[m][:,0]
364                        
365                            nut = Ym_list[m][t,:] - yhat
366                            Ft = (LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
367                                + LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
368                                + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T)
369                            Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
370                            Xit = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
371                            sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
372                            At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut 
373                            Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
374                        
375                            At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
376                            Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
377                    else:
378                        if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
379                            At1 = At_list[m]
380                            Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
381                            # Forecasting
382                            alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
383                            Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
384                            Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
385                            yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
386                            nut = Yq_list[m][t,:] - yhat  
387                            Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
388                                + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
389                                + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
390                            Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
391                            Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
392                            sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
393                            At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
394                            Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
395                            At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
396                            Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
397                        else:
398                            At1 = At_list[m]
399                            Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
400                            # Forecasting
401                            alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
402                            Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
403                            Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
404                            At_list[m] = alphahat 
405                            Pt_list[m] = Phat 
406                            At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
407                            Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
408                Atildemat_list[m][j,:] = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:]
409                
410                if j == 0:
411                    Pt_last_list.append(Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F"))
412                else:
413                    Pt_last_list[m] = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F")
414                Ptildemat_list[m][j,:,:] = Pt_last_list[m]
415                
416                ########## Unbalanced Dataset ###########
417                
418                kn = nv_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)
419                
420                # Measurement Equation
421                
422                Z1 = np.zeros((Nm_list[m], kn))
423                Z1[:,:Nm_list[m]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m])
424                
425                Z2 = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], kn))
426                
427                for bb in range(Nq_list[m]):
428                    for ll in range(freq_ratio_list[m]):
429                        Z2[bb, (ll+1)*Nm_list[m]+ll*Nq_list[m]+bb] = 1/freq_ratio_list[m]
430                
431                ZZ = np.vstack((Z1,Z2))
432                
433                if Ym_list[m].size:
434                    BAt = (np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-1,:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]])))))
435                    for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
436                        BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-(rr+1),:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))))
437                
438                else: 
439                    BAt = np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]]))
440                    for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
441                        BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))
442                
443                BPt = np.zeros((kn,kn))
444                for rr in range(p_list[m]+1):
445                    for vv in range(p_list[m]+1):
446                        BPt[(rr+1)*Nm_list[m]+rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), (vv+1)*Nm_list[m]+vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])] = np.squeeze(
447                            Ptildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m],vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*Nq_list[m]])
448                        
449                BAt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn))
450                BPt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn**2))
451                
452                
453                BAt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BAt
454                BPt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
455                
456                # Define companion form matrix PHIF
457                PHIF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
458                IF = np.eye(nv_list[m])
459                for i in range(p_list[m]):
460                    PHIF[(i+1)*nv_list[m]:(i+2)*nv_list[m], i*nv_list[m]:(i+1)*nv_list[m]] = IF
461                    
462                PHIF[:nv_list[m], :nv_list[m]*p_list[m]] = Phi_list[m][:-1,:].T
463                
464                # Define constant term CONF
465                CONF = np.hstack((Phi_list[m][-1,:].T, np.zeros((nv_list[m]*p_list[m]))))
466                
467                # Define covariance term SIGF
468                SIGF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
469                SIGF[:nv_list[m],:nv_list[m]] = sigma_list[m]
470                
471                # Filter Loop
472                ###################
473                
474                for t in range(nobs_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]):
475                    
476                    #new indicator
477                    kkk = t-nobs_list[m]
478                    
479                    # Define new data (ND) and new Z matrix (NZ)
480                    ND = YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:][~np.isnan(YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:])]
481                    NZ = ZZ[~index_NY_list[m][:,kkk],:]
482                    
483                    BAt1 = BAt
484                    BPt1 = BPt
485                    
486                    # Forecasting
487                    Balphahat = PHIF @ BAt1 + CONF
488                    BPhat = PHIF @ BPt1 @ PHIF.T + SIGF
489                    BPhat = 0.5 * (BPhat+BPhat.T)
490                    
491                    Byhat = NZ @ Balphahat
492                    Bnut = ND - Byhat
493                    
494                    BFt = NZ @ BPhat @ NZ.T
495                    BFt = 0.5*(BFt+BFt.T)
496                    
497                    #Updating
498                    sol_1 = (BPhat @ NZ.T) @ invert_matrix(BFt)
499                    BAt = Balphahat + sol_1 @ Bnut
500                    BPt = BPhat - sol_1 @ (BPhat @ NZ.T).T
501                    BAt_mat[t,:] = BAt
502                    BPt_mat[t,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
503                    
504                    
505                AT_draw = np.zeros((Tnew_list[m]+1, kn))
506                
507                # Draw from multivariate normal
508                Pchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((kn, kn), order = "F"))
509                AT_draw[-1, :] = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:]+np.transpose(Pchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
510                
511                # Kalman Smoother
512                #####################
513                
514                for i in range(Tnew_list[m]):
515                    
516                    BAtt = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]
517                    BPtt = BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape((kn,kn), order = "F")
518                    
519                    BPhat = PHIF @ BPtt @ PHIF.T + SIGF
520                    BPhat = 0.5*(BPhat+BPhat.T)
521                    
522                    inv_BPhat = invert_matrix(BPhat)
523                    
524                    Bnut = AT_draw[-(i+1),:]- PHIF @ BAtt - CONF
525                    
526                    Amean = BAtt + (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ Bnut
527                    Pmean = BPtt - (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ np.transpose(BPtt @ PHIF.T)        
528            
529                    #Draw from multivariate normal
530                    Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
531                    AT_draw[-2-i,:] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
532                    
533                ########## Balanced Dataset ###########
534                
535                At_draw = np.zeros((nobs_list[m], Nq_list[m] * (p_list[m]+1)))
536                for kk in range(p_list[m]+1):
537                    At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1, kk * Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*+Nq_list[m]] = AT_draw[0,(kk+1)*Nm_list[m] + kk*Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]
538                    
539            
540                # Kalman Smoother
541                #####################
542                
543                for i in range(nobs_list[m]-1):
544                    Att = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]#[:, np.newaxis]
545                    Ptt = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), order = "F")
546                    
547                    
548                    Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
549                    
550                    Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
551                    
552                    inv_Phat = invert_matrix(Phat)
553                    
554                    nut = At_draw[nobs_list[m]-(i+1), :] - GAMMAs_list[m] @ Att - GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1)] - GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
555
556                    
557                    temp = Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T
558                    Amean = Att + temp @ inv_Phat @ nut
559                    Pmean = Ptt - temp @ inv_Phat @ np.transpose(temp)
560                    
561                    Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
562                    At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1), :] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)))
563                
564            
565            
566                # Minesota Prior                            
567                ########################
568                if Ym_list[m].size:
569                    YY = np.vstack((np.hstack((Ym_list[m], At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]])), AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
570                else:
571                    YY = np.vstack((At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]], AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
572            
573                
574                #lstate = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]))
575                #for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
576                #    lstate[hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
577                #    lstate[hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
578            
579                if (j%self.thining == 0):
580                    for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
581                        lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
582                        lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
583
584                nobs_ = np.shape(YY)[0] - T0_list[m]
585                spec = np.hstack((nlags_list_[m], T0_list[m], self.nex, nv_list[m], nobs_))
586            
587            
588                # dummy observations and actual observations
589                #mdd, YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = mdd_(self.hyp, YY, spec)
590                mdd_list[m], YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = mdd_(hyp_list[m], YY, spec)
591                
592                if (j%self.thining == 0):
593                    YYactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = YYact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:] #TODO
594                    XXactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = XXact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:]
595                
596                
597                # Draws from posterior distribution
598                
599                Tdummy, n = YYdum.shape
600                n = int(n)
601                Tdummy = int(Tdummy)
602                Tobs, n = YYact.shape
603                X = np.vstack((XXact, XXdum))
604                Y = np.vstack((YYact, YYdum))
605                p = int(spec[0])
606                T = Tobs + Tdummy
607                F = np.zeros((int(n*p), int(n*p)))
608                I = np.eye(n)
609                
610                for i in range(p-1):
611                    F[(i+1)*n:(i+2)*n, i*n:(i+1)*n] = I
612
613                vl, d, vr = np.linalg.svd(X, full_matrices=False)
614                vr = vr.T
615                di = 1/d
616                B = vl.T @ Y
617                xxi = (vr * np.tile(di.T,(n*p+1,1))) 
618                inv_x = xxi @ xxi.T
619                Phi_tilde = xxi @ B
620
621                Sigma = (Y - X @ Phi_tilde).T @ (Y - X @ Phi_tilde)
622                
623                # Draws from the density Sigma | Y 
624                sigma = invwishart.rvs(scale = Sigma, df = T-n*p-1)
625                
626                # Draws from density vec(Phi)|Sigma(j), Y
627                sigma_chol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(np.kron(sigma, inv_x))
628                phi_new =  np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")) + sigma_chol @ np.random.standard_normal(sigma_chol.shape[0])
629                
630                #phi_new = np.random.default_rng().multivariate_normal(mean = np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")), cov = np.kron(sigma, inv_x), method = "cholesky")
631                
632                Phi = phi_new.reshape(n*p+1,n,order = "F")
633                
634                if j > 0:
635                    Phi_list[m] = Phi
636                elif j == 0 & m == 0:
637                    Phi_list[m] = Phi
638                
639                if (j % self.thining == 0):
640                    j_temp = int(j/self.thining)
641                    Sigmap_list[m][j_temp,:,:] = sigma
642                    Phip_list[m][j_temp,:,:]   = Phi
643                    Cons_list[m][j_temp,:]     = Phi[-1,:]
644                
645                # Define phi(qm), phi(qq), phi(qc)
646                phi_qm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
647                for i in range(p_list[m]):
648                    phi_qm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]
649                    
650                phi_qq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
651                for i in range(p):
652                    phi_qq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), Nm_list[m]:]
653                    
654                phi_qc = Phi[-1,Nm_list[m]:, np.newaxis]
655                
656                # Define  phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc)
657                phi_mm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
658                for i in range(p):
659                    phi_mm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]
660            
661                phi_mq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
662                for i in range(p):
663                    phi_mq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]),:Nm_list[m]]      
664                
665                phi_mc = Phi[-1,:Nm_list[m], np.newaxis]
666            
667                # Define Covariance Term sig_mm, sig_mq, sig_qm, sig_qq
668                if Nm_list[m]:
669                    sig_mm_list[m] = sigma[:Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]  
670                    sig_mq_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]+np.transpose(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]))
671                    sig_qm_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]+np.transpose(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]))
672                    sig_qq_list[m] = sigma[Nm_list[m]:,Nm_list[m]:]
673                else:
674                    sig_qq_list[m] =  np.atleast_2d(sigma)
675                
676                
677                # Define Transition Equation Matrices
678                GAMMAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.transpose(phi_qq), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m])))), np.hstack((np.eye(p*Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))))
679                GAMMAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_qm), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
680                GAMMAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_qc, np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],1))))
681                GAMMAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))
682                
683                # Define Measurment equation Matrices
684                LAMBDAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m],Nq_list[m])), np.transpose(phi_mq))),1/freq_ratio_list[m]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m]), freq_ratio_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]*(p-(freq_ratio_list[m]-1))))))))
685                
686            
687                LAMBDAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm), np.zeros((Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
688                LAMBDAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_mc, np.zeros((Nq_list[m],1))))
689                LAMBDAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nm_list[m]))))
690                
691                # Define W matrix
692                Wmatrix_list[m] = np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m], Nq_list[m]))))
693                LAMBDAs_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m],LAMBDAs_list[m])
694                LAMBDAz_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAz_list[m])
695                LAMBDAc_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAc_list[m])
696                LAMBDAu_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAu_list[m])
697
698                # now we need to define the new low frequency data as the temporally disaggregated
699                # low frequency data of the current iteration
700                
701                if m < (len(YMh_list)-1):
702                    if j == 0:
703                        #Yq_list.append((np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T)
704                        YQ0_list.append(YYact)#YQ0_list.append(YYact[:,-Nq_list[m+1]:])
705                        YQ_list.append(np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1))))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:])
706                        #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
707                        YM_list[m+1] = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
708                        
709                        T_list.append(YQ_list[m+1].shape[0])
710                        
711                        Tstar_list.append(YM_list[m+1].shape[0])
712
713                        Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1])
714
715                        
716                        YDATA_list.append(np.full((Tstar_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1]), np.nan))
717                        YDATA_list[m+1][:,:Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1]#[-Tstar_list[m+1]:,:]
718                        
719                        T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
720                        p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
721                        nlags_list.append(p_list[m+1])
722                        kq_list.append(Nq_list[m+1] * p_list[m+1])
723                        nobs_list.append(int(T_list[m+1]) - int(T0_list[m+1]))
724                        Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T0_list[m+1])
725                        
726                    
727                        
728                        #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
729                        #YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
730                        YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)]))+int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
731                        varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[m+1].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
732                        smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[m+1].index[int(T0_list[m+1]):])
733                        
734                        index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[m+1][nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1]:Tnobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
735                        
736                        # Parameter estimation
737                        # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
738                        Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1])))
739                        Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1]))))
740                        Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1])))
741                        lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[m+1],int(Tnobs_list[m+1]))))
742                        YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[m+1]+1,nv_list[m+1])))
743                        XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1)))
744                        
745                        At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
746                        Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), (Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))**2)))
747                        Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
748                        Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1),Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
749                        loglh_list.append(0)
750                        counter_list.append(0)
751                        
752                        # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
753                        phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
754                        phi_mm_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m+1])
755                        
756                        phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
757                        phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[m+1])))
758                        phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[m+1])))
759                        
760                        Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])*(int(p_list[m+1])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])))))
761                        
762                        # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
763                        GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1), Nq_list[m+1] * (int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
764                        IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
765                        
766                        for k in range(int(p_list[m+1])):
767                            GAMMAs_list[m+1][(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+2)*Nq_list[m+1], k*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]] = IQ
768                            
769                        GAMMAs_list[m+1][:Nq_list[m+1],:Nq_list[m+1]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
770                        
771                        GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]* (int(p_list[m+1])+1), int(Nm_list[m+1])*p_list[m+1])))
772                        GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), 1)))
773                        GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros((p_list[m+1]*Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
774
775                        LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[m+1]))),1/freq_ratio_list[m+1]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), freq_ratio_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]-(freq_ratio_list[m+1]-1)))))))))
776                        
777                        LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1], p_list[m+1]*Nm_list[m+1])))))
778                        LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],1)))))
779                        LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1])))))
780                        
781                        # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
782                        sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]+Nq_list[m+1]))
783                        sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]])
784                        sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]:])
785                        sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:, :Nm_list[m+1]])
786                        sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:,Nm_list[m+1]:])
787                        
788                        # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
789                        Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
790                        LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAs_list[m+1])
791                        LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAz_list[m+1])
792                        LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAc_list[m+1])
793                        LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAu_list[m+1])
794                        
795                        At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
796                        Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
797                        
798                        for kk in range(5):
799                            Pt_list[m+1] = GAMMAs_list[m+1] @ Pt_list[m+1] @ GAMMAs_list[m+1].T + GAMMAu_list[m+1] @ sig_qq_list[m+1] @ GAMMAu_list[m+1].T
800                        
801                        #YM_short = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
802                        
803                        # Lagged HF observations
804                        Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]*p_list[m+1])))
805                        for k in range(p_list[m+1]):
806                            Zm_list[m+1][:, k * Nm_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]-(k+1):T0_list[m+1]+nobs_list[m+1]-(k+1),:]
807                        # Observations in Monthly Freq
808                        
809                        Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
810                        #Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])    
811                        #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1])#
812                        Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
813                        
814                        
815                        
816                    else:
817                        #Yq_list[m+1] = (np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T
818                        YQ0_list[m+1] = YYact
819                        YQ_list[m+1] = np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1)))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
820                        Yq_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]#YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]
821                        T_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1].shape[0]
822                        Tnew_list[m+1] = Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1]
823                        
824                    YDATA_list[m+1][:T_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1]:] = YQ_list[m+1]    
825                
826                if j == 0:
827                    At_draw_list.append(At_draw)
828                else:
829                    At_draw_list[m] = At_draw
830                
831                if j == 0:
832                    Pmean_list.append(Pmean)
833                else:
834                    Pmean_list[m] = Pmean
835                        
836                        
837            #TODO
838        
839            
840        return mdd_list[-1]
841        
842    def calc_mdd_1(lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1):
843        
844        hyp_list = [[lambda1_1, lambda2_1, 1, lambda4_1, lambda5]]
845        mdd = estim(hyp_list, nsim)
846        
847        return mdd
848    
849    def calc_mdd_2(lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1,
850                lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2):
851        hyp_list = [[lambda1_1, lambda2_1, 1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1],
852                    [lambda1_2, lambda2_2, 1, lambda4_2, lambda5_2]]
853        mdd = estim(hyp_list, nsim)
854        
855        return mdd
856    
857    def calc_mdd_3(lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1,
858                lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2,
859                lambda1_3, lambda2_3, lambda4_3, lambda5_3):
860        
861        hyp_list = [[lambda1_1, lambda2_1, 1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1],
862                    [lambda1_2, lambda2_2, 1, lambda4_2, lambda5_2],
863                    [lambda1_3, lambda2_3, 1, lambda4_3, lambda5_3]]
864        mdd = estim(hyp_list, nsim)
865        
866        return mdd
867        
868    if len(mufbvar_data.frequencies)-1 == 1:
869        optimizer = BayesianOptimization(
870        f= calc_mdd_1,
871        pbounds=pbounds,
872        verbose= 2, # verbose = 1 prints only when a maximum is observed, verbose = 0 is silent
873        )
874        
875        
876    if len(mufbvar_data.frequencies)-1 == 2:
877        optimizer = BayesianOptimization(
878        f= calc_mdd_2,
879        pbounds=pbounds,
880        verbose= 2, # verbose = 1 prints only when a maximum is observed, verbose = 0 is silent
881        )
882        
883    if len(mufbvar_data.frequencies)-1 == 3:
884        optimizer = BayesianOptimization(
885        f= calc_mdd_3,
886        pbounds=pbounds,
887        verbose= 2, # verbose = 1 prints only when a maximum is observed, verbose = 0 is silent
888        )
889        
890    optimizer.maximize(
891    init_points = init_points,
892    n_iter = n_iter,
893    )
894    
895    hyp_opt = optimizer.max
896    
897    sublists = [list(hyp_opt["params"].values())[i:i+4] for i in range(0, len(list(hyp_opt["params"].values())), 4)] 
898    hyp = []
899    for i in sublists:
900        i.insert(2,1)
901        hyp.append(i)
902    
903    
904    if save == True:
905        with open(name, 'w') as f:
906            print(hyp, file=f)
907            
908    return hyp

This method uses bayesian optimization to find the hyperparameters with the highest mdd

lambda 1: overall tightness

lambda 2: scaling down the variance for the coefficients of a distant lag

lambda 3: number of observations used for obtaining the prior for the covariance matrix of error terms, fixed to 1

lambda 4: . tuning parameter for coefficients for constant

lambda 5: tuning parameter for the covariance between coefficients

Parameters

mufbvar_data : mufbvar_data class object data in the form of a mufbvar_data class object pbound : dict boundries for each hyperparameter

two frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1
three frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2
four frequencies: lambda1_1, lambda2_1, lambda4_1, lambda5_1, lambda1_2, lambda2_2, lambda4_2, lambda5_2, lambda1_3, lambda2_3, lambda4_3, lambda5_3

init_points : int How many steps of random exploration you want to perform n_iter : int How many steps of bayesian optimization you want to perform nsim : int number of draws in each MUFBVAR estimation save : boolean True if you want to save the hyperparameters as a txt name : str path where you want to save the hyperparameters

Returns

hyp : list list containing the optimized hyperparameters

class mufbvar_data: 
 45class mufbvar_data:
 46    
 47    """
 48    Class to prepare the data that will be used in the MUFBVAR
 49    ...
 50
 51    Parameters
 52    ----------
 53    data : list of pandas DataFrames
 54        Data of each frequency stored in a pandas DataFrame, all stored in one list
 55    trans : list of numpy arrays
 56        A separate numpy array for each frequency all stored in a list. /n
 57        0: log is taken 
 58        1: divided by 100
 59    frequencies : List of the frequencies of the data, in order lowest to highest 
 60        "Y", "Q", "M", "W", "D" 
 61        """
 62    
 63    def __init__(self, data, trans, frequencies):
 64        
 65        
 66        
 67        # Creating lists of highfrequency data
 68        
 69        YMX_list = deque()
 70        YM0_list = deque()
 71        select_m_list = deque()
 72        vars_m_list = deque()
 73        YMh_list = deque()
 74        exc_list = deque()
 75        index_list = deque()
 76        
 77        
 78        for i in range(1, len(frequencies)):
 79            YMX_list.append(data[i])
 80            YM0_list.append(data[i].to_numpy())
 81            select_m_list.append(trans[i])
 82            vars_m_list.append(data[i].columns[:])
 83            YMh_list.append(data[i].to_numpy())
 84            index_list.append(data[i].index)
 85        
 86        input_data = copy.deepcopy(YMX_list)
 87        
 88        # Creating list of low frequency data
 89        # Here only the first entry with the lowest frequency data is generated
 90        # The other entries are generated during the estimation
 91        
 92        YQX_list = deque()
 93        YQ0_list = deque()
 94        select_q = deque()
 95        
 96        YQX_list.append(data[0])
 97        YQ0_list.append(YQX_list[-1].to_numpy())
 98        select_q.append(trans[0])
 99        vars_q = YQX_list[0].columns[:]
100        
101        input_data_Q =  copy.deepcopy(YQX_list[0])
102        
103        
104        varlist_list = deque()
105        select_list = deque()
106        select_c_list =deque()
107        
108        Nm_list = deque()
109        nv_list = deque()
110        Nq_list = deque()
111        
112        Nq_list.append(YQX_list[0].shape[1])
113        
114        for i in range(len(YMX_list)-1):
115            Nq_list.append(YQX_list[0].shape[1] + YMX_list[i].shape[1]) 
116            if len(select_m_list[i]) == 0:
117                select_q.append( select_q[0])
118            else:
119                select_q.append(np.hstack((select_m_list[i], select_q[0])))
120                
121                
122        for i in range(len(YMX_list)):
123            if i > 0:
124                new_list = [item for item in list(itertools.islice(select_m_list, 0, i+1)) if len(item) > 0]
125                select_list.append(np.hstack((np.hstack(list(reversed(new_list))), select_q[0])))
126                rev_vars_m = list(itertools.islice(vars_m_list, 0, i+1))
127                rev_vars_m.reverse()
128                varlist_list.append(np.squeeze(np.hstack((np.hstack(rev_vars_m), vars_q)))) 
129            else:
130                if select_m_list[i].size:
131                    select_list.append(np.hstack((select_m_list[i], select_q[0])))
132                    varlist_list.append(np.hstack((vars_m_list[i], vars_q)))
133                else:
134                    select_list.append(select_q[0])
135                    varlist_list.append(np.squeeze(vars_q))
136            Nm_list.append(int(np.shape(YM0_list[i])[1]))
137            nv_list.append(int(Nm_list[i] + Nq_list[i]))
138        
139        select_list_sep = list(select_q)
140        select_list_sep.extend(select_m_list)
141        
142        
143        # Calculate the frequency ratios
144        
145        freq_ratio_list = deque()
146        
147        for freq in range(1,len(frequencies)):
148            freq_lf = frequencies[freq-1]
149            freq_hf = frequencies[freq]
150            if freq_hf == "Q" and freq_lf == "Y":
151                freq_ratio = 4
152            elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Y":
153                freq_ratio = 12
154            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Y":
155                freq_ratio = 48
156            elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "Y":
157                freq_ratio = 260
158            elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Q":
159                freq_ratio = 3
160            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Q":
161                freq_ratio = 12
162            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "M":
163                freq_ratio = 4
164            elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "W":
165                freq_ratio = 5
166                
167            else:
168                print("Higher frequency: ", freq_hf, " Lower Frequency: ", freq_lf, end ='\n')
169                freq_ratio = input("Please enter frequency ratio")
170            
171            freq_ratio_list.append(freq_ratio)
172        
173        
174        #performe data transformations
175        
176        for i in range(len(YM0_list)):
177            if select_m_list[i].size:
178                YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 1)] = YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 1)]/100
179                YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 0)] = np.log(YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 0)])
180        
181        YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 1)] = YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 1)]/100
182        YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 0)] = np.log(YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 0)])
183        
184        
185        YM_list = copy.deepcopy(YM0_list)
186        
187        # Low frequency data in higher frequency
188        YQ_list = deque()
189        YQ_list.append(np.kron(YQ0_list[0], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[0],1))))
190        
191        Tstar_list = deque()
192        T_list = deque()
193        YDATA_list = deque()
194        
195        if YM_list[0].size:
196            Tstar_list.append(YM_list[0].shape[0])
197            YDATA_list.append(np.full((Tstar_list[0],nv_list[0]), np.nan))
198            YDATA_list[0][:,:Nm_list[0]] = YM_list[0]
199        else:
200            Tstar_list.append(YQ_list[0].shape[0])
201            YDATA_list.append(np.full((0,nv_list[0]), np.nan))
202            
203        T_list.append(YQ_list[0].shape[0])
204        #for freq in range(1,len(self.frequencies)-1):
205        #    T_list.append(np.kron(YMX_list[freq-1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[freq],1))).shape[0])
206        
207        
208        if YDATA_list[0].size:     
209            YDATA_list[0][:T_list[0],Nm_list[0]:] = YQ_list[0]   
210        else:
211            YDATA_list[0] = YQ_list[0] 
212            
213        
214        #attach variables to instance
215        
216        self.YMX_list = YMX_list
217        self.YM0_list = YM0_list
218        self.select_m_list = select_m_list
219        self.vars_m_list = vars_m_list
220        self.YMh_list = YMh_list
221        self.exc_list = exc_list
222        self.index_list = index_list
223        self.frequencies = frequencies
224        self.YQX_list = YQX_list
225        self.YQ0_list = YQ0_list
226        self.select_q = select_q
227        self.input_data_Q =  input_data_Q
228        self.varlist_list = varlist_list
229        self.select_list = select_list
230        self.select_c_list = select_c_list
231        self.Nm_list = Nm_list
232        self.nv_list = nv_list
233        self.Nq_list = Nq_list
234        self.select_list_sep = select_list_sep
235        self.freq_ratio_list = freq_ratio_list
236        self.YQ_list = YQ_list
237        self.Tstar_list = Tstar_list
238        self.T_list = T_list
239        self.YDATA_list = YDATA_list
240        self.YM_list = YM_list
241        self.input_data = input_data

Class to prepare the data that will be used in the MUFBVAR ...

Parameters

data : list of pandas DataFrames Data of each frequency stored in a pandas DataFrame, all stored in one list trans : list of numpy arrays A separate numpy array for each frequency all stored in a list. /n 0: log is taken 1: divided by 100 frequencies : List of the frequencies of the data, in order lowest to highest "Y", "Q", "M", "W", "D"

mufbvar_data(data, trans, frequencies) 
 63    def __init__(self, data, trans, frequencies):
 64        
 65        
 66        
 67        # Creating lists of highfrequency data
 68        
 69        YMX_list = deque()
 70        YM0_list = deque()
 71        select_m_list = deque()
 72        vars_m_list = deque()
 73        YMh_list = deque()
 74        exc_list = deque()
 75        index_list = deque()
 76        
 77        
 78        for i in range(1, len(frequencies)):
 79            YMX_list.append(data[i])
 80            YM0_list.append(data[i].to_numpy())
 81            select_m_list.append(trans[i])
 82            vars_m_list.append(data[i].columns[:])
 83            YMh_list.append(data[i].to_numpy())
 84            index_list.append(data[i].index)
 85        
 86        input_data = copy.deepcopy(YMX_list)
 87        
 88        # Creating list of low frequency data
 89        # Here only the first entry with the lowest frequency data is generated
 90        # The other entries are generated during the estimation
 91        
 92        YQX_list = deque()
 93        YQ0_list = deque()
 94        select_q = deque()
 95        
 96        YQX_list.append(data[0])
 97        YQ0_list.append(YQX_list[-1].to_numpy())
 98        select_q.append(trans[0])
 99        vars_q = YQX_list[0].columns[:]
100        
101        input_data_Q =  copy.deepcopy(YQX_list[0])
102        
103        
104        varlist_list = deque()
105        select_list = deque()
106        select_c_list =deque()
107        
108        Nm_list = deque()
109        nv_list = deque()
110        Nq_list = deque()
111        
112        Nq_list.append(YQX_list[0].shape[1])
113        
114        for i in range(len(YMX_list)-1):
115            Nq_list.append(YQX_list[0].shape[1] + YMX_list[i].shape[1]) 
116            if len(select_m_list[i]) == 0:
117                select_q.append( select_q[0])
118            else:
119                select_q.append(np.hstack((select_m_list[i], select_q[0])))
120                
121                
122        for i in range(len(YMX_list)):
123            if i > 0:
124                new_list = [item for item in list(itertools.islice(select_m_list, 0, i+1)) if len(item) > 0]
125                select_list.append(np.hstack((np.hstack(list(reversed(new_list))), select_q[0])))
126                rev_vars_m = list(itertools.islice(vars_m_list, 0, i+1))
127                rev_vars_m.reverse()
128                varlist_list.append(np.squeeze(np.hstack((np.hstack(rev_vars_m), vars_q)))) 
129            else:
130                if select_m_list[i].size:
131                    select_list.append(np.hstack((select_m_list[i], select_q[0])))
132                    varlist_list.append(np.hstack((vars_m_list[i], vars_q)))
133                else:
134                    select_list.append(select_q[0])
135                    varlist_list.append(np.squeeze(vars_q))
136            Nm_list.append(int(np.shape(YM0_list[i])[1]))
137            nv_list.append(int(Nm_list[i] + Nq_list[i]))
138        
139        select_list_sep = list(select_q)
140        select_list_sep.extend(select_m_list)
141        
142        
143        # Calculate the frequency ratios
144        
145        freq_ratio_list = deque()
146        
147        for freq in range(1,len(frequencies)):
148            freq_lf = frequencies[freq-1]
149            freq_hf = frequencies[freq]
150            if freq_hf == "Q" and freq_lf == "Y":
151                freq_ratio = 4
152            elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Y":
153                freq_ratio = 12
154            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Y":
155                freq_ratio = 48
156            elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "Y":
157                freq_ratio = 260
158            elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Q":
159                freq_ratio = 3
160            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Q":
161                freq_ratio = 12
162            elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "M":
163                freq_ratio = 4
164            elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "W":
165                freq_ratio = 5
166                
167            else:
168                print("Higher frequency: ", freq_hf, " Lower Frequency: ", freq_lf, end ='\n')
169                freq_ratio = input("Please enter frequency ratio")
170            
171            freq_ratio_list.append(freq_ratio)
172        
173        
174        #performe data transformations
175        
176        for i in range(len(YM0_list)):
177            if select_m_list[i].size:
178                YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 1)] = YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 1)]/100
179                YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 0)] = np.log(YM0_list[i][:,(select_m_list[i] == 0)])
180        
181        YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 1)] = YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 1)]/100
182        YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 0)] = np.log(YQ0_list[0][:,(select_q[0] == 0)])
183        
184        
185        YM_list = copy.deepcopy(YM0_list)
186        
187        # Low frequency data in higher frequency
188        YQ_list = deque()
189        YQ_list.append(np.kron(YQ0_list[0], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[0],1))))
190        
191        Tstar_list = deque()
192        T_list = deque()
193        YDATA_list = deque()
194        
195        if YM_list[0].size:
196            Tstar_list.append(YM_list[0].shape[0])
197            YDATA_list.append(np.full((Tstar_list[0],nv_list[0]), np.nan))
198            YDATA_list[0][:,:Nm_list[0]] = YM_list[0]
199        else:
200            Tstar_list.append(YQ_list[0].shape[0])
201            YDATA_list.append(np.full((0,nv_list[0]), np.nan))
202            
203        T_list.append(YQ_list[0].shape[0])
204        #for freq in range(1,len(self.frequencies)-1):
205        #    T_list.append(np.kron(YMX_list[freq-1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[freq],1))).shape[0])
206        
207        
208        if YDATA_list[0].size:     
209            YDATA_list[0][:T_list[0],Nm_list[0]:] = YQ_list[0]   
210        else:
211            YDATA_list[0] = YQ_list[0] 
212            
213        
214        #attach variables to instance
215        
216        self.YMX_list = YMX_list
217        self.YM0_list = YM0_list
218        self.select_m_list = select_m_list
219        self.vars_m_list = vars_m_list
220        self.YMh_list = YMh_list
221        self.exc_list = exc_list
222        self.index_list = index_list
223        self.frequencies = frequencies
224        self.YQX_list = YQX_list
225        self.YQ0_list = YQ0_list
226        self.select_q = select_q
227        self.input_data_Q =  input_data_Q
228        self.varlist_list = varlist_list
229        self.select_list = select_list
230        self.select_c_list = select_c_list
231        self.Nm_list = Nm_list
232        self.nv_list = nv_list
233        self.Nq_list = Nq_list
234        self.select_list_sep = select_list_sep
235        self.freq_ratio_list = freq_ratio_list
236        self.YQ_list = YQ_list
237        self.Tstar_list = Tstar_list
238        self.T_list = T_list
239        self.YDATA_list = YDATA_list
240        self.YM_list = YM_list
241        self.input_data = input_data
YMX_list
YM0_list
select_m_list
vars_m_list
YMh_list
exc_list
index_list
frequencies

YQ0_list
select_q
input_data_Q

select_list
select_c_list

nv_list

select_list_sep
freq_ratio_list
YQ_list
Tstar_list
T_list
YDATA_list
YM_list
input_data
